output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?date WHERE {
  ?episode wdt:P179 wd:Q337248 ; wdt:P1355 wd:Q697704 ; wdt:P577 ?date .
}
ORDER BY ?date
LIMIT 1
